Average Price: 1,200pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 35

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Crypt of Dalnir
NPC Name
a coerced penkeeper


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Crypt of Dalnir

Times Change
QuoteReply
# May 02 2004 at 7:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591793809933
Scholar
116 posts
Found this as extra on an NPC vendor for 462p - passed on buying - its just not worth that much.

My how times have changed.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 16 2002 at 9:29 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Picked this up today off the penkeeper in the Crusader room (third of four times killing him, total). Does this thing really go for 2k+ (play on Xev server).
Dropped
QuoteReply
# Feb 11 2002 at 10:11 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247242173
73 posts
I just wanted to say that it dropped off of the coerced penkeeper in the undead blacksmith room right off of the room where you drop down onto the 3rd floor. He also dropped the key.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 11 2002 at 10:10 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I just wanted to say that it dropped off of the coerced penkeeper in the undead blacksmith room right off of the room where you drop down onto the 3rd floor. He also dropped the key.
BCR is Better
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2001 at 4:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1710720965640
175 posts
Blackened Crystal Robe, 6int, 5cha, 800-1200pp.

Enough said.
▲ Page top
RE: BCR is Better
QuoteReply
# Jun 01 2002 at 11:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758554395
180 posts
You are missing out on the point of INT... mana
for example at level 60 this robe with 4 int and 25 mana is the same as a straight 9int robe, not too shabby for the level obtained, although not worn by many 60's im sure, although one bought mine =)
▲ Page top
RE: BCR is Better
QuoteReply
# Nov 12 2001 at 1:57 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754114610
Scholar
61 posts
True, the BCR is a great robe if you're a chanter, but everybody and their mother has one on Xev. If you want to look different go camp this one(and if you buy a robe that you could go camp you are downright nuts! Just my 2cp as I also hunted fer my BCR). This one gets added to my growing robe collection.
▲ Page top
RE: BCR is Better
QuoteReply
# May 14 2002 at 9:08 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772304627
84 posts
If you can afford it, and you have a BRC, reasons to buy it:


A: Good looks
B: Impress newbies
C: Almost no ones heard of these
D: Better then the BCR if you get taunt and have to get up close to it

Natem Shadowchasing
"/ooc Why does no one like Enchanters anymore?"
"/ooc Ok, fine, anyone who likes Enchanters gets a free breeze at the Nexus zone"
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 05 2001 at 10:19 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I read your posts about how this is a long camp and stuf... and I can't help but think.... WHY would you WANT this? It just isn't worth it. Not to mention, it looks like crap (not quite as bad as the blue fairy oracle). Just go grab an FBR because they are easy as hell to nab, and forget about the pathetic stats of this robe... you could even get an advisor *gasp*. At 47 soloing the advisor was a joke.. get a good grp of 25-30s in there with invis, you could take the room wicked fast with an enchanter(which hopefully you are=))... then just gate out, or train out. Stats are way better than this, and it doesnt make you look like a stupid lime.
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 12 2001 at 4:09 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Someone on BB is holding a raid of this place tomorrow with alot of characters. i'm gonna go too (Lvl 24 chanter) if i can make it. This is the only thing i want out of the whole raid.
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 01 2001 at 4:03 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) shouldn't an enchanter only itme have at least +1 charisma?
Pricing
QuoteReply
# Dec 25 2000 at 12:08 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Very rare robe. When I first got it, I was told it sold for 15k, though I think it sells for more like 9k . Ended up giving it to a friend as I couldn't find an enchanter with something equivalent price wise to trade.
▲ Page top
Rare??
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2000 at 1:10 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Ooops messed up on the first post..( but....... is this Robe rare off the Penkeeper?
▲ Page top
RE: Rare??
QuoteReply
# Apr 04 2001 at 7:54 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yes, this is off the Penkeeper. I got mine on the 3rd floor Penkeeper behind the one way door, tho I'm sure its also a drop off the Penkeeper close to where u fall from 2nd.Very nice robe, unique in color ( dont see to many ) and decent stats, hell if u r a chanter of any mirth you have 200 cha by the time u loot this anyway so who cares that it has no cha. But its still a desire only robe, if u need a cha bonus try others.
Also not that rare, got it on the 4th kill of Penkeeper..ie 6 hours
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Dec 16 2000 at 1:09 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post)
